title: 404 Emergency Audit — 125 Not Found Pages
data_source: GSC UI — Pages report, Not found (404) filter
requires_export: Full URL list needed from GSC export for precise fixes
known_404_sources: Scenario pages deleted in V2 pruning (~2,000 removed)
Old calculator slug variants that were renamed
Programmatic pages that changed URL pattern
Typo URLs from internal links or external sources
Old sitemap entries not cleaned up

sitemap_contamination.expected: Some 404 URLs may still be in sitemap

valuable_page_lost.check: Was any 404 a valuable page that should exist?
valuable_page_lost.action_if_yes: RECREATE page or set up 301 redirect
valuable_page_lost.action_if_no: Ensure no internal/external links point to it

priority_fixes.urgent_sitemap: Any 404 URL in sitemap.xml → remove immediately
priority_fixes.urgent_internal_links: Any 404 URL linked from indexed pages → fix links
priority_fixes.high_impressions: Any 404 URL with GSC impressions → recreate or redirect
priority_fixes.low_priority: 404s with no impressions, no links, no sitemap → leave as 404

action_plan.step_1: Export full 404 URL list from GSC
action_plan.step_3: Search codebase for internal links to 404 URLs → fix
action_plan.step_4: Identify any high-impression 404s → recreate or redirect
action_plan.step_6: Resubmit sitemap to GSC after fixes

do_not: recreate pages without audit (may recreate thin content)
